title: Reasonable adjustments policy for judicial office holders: 2025
body: "This is a revised version of the Ministry of Justice’s Reasonable Adjustments Policy for Disabled Judicial Office Holders and replaces the 2011 version. Ensuring reasonable adjustments for judicial office holders with disabilities remains a priority.  The revised policy aims to clarify responsibilities, particularly in managing requests for reasonable adjustments when new judges, magistrates and tribunal members are appointed.  "
